title: SUMMER TIME
synopsis: Her mother was hospitalized that summer. This day from Aki-chan's summer is tinged with sadness in the company of her trusted Ryukyu dog named Goyapochi. 1st year work 2017, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Komaneko: The First Step
titleNative: こまねこ はじめのいっぽ
synopsis: One sunny day, female kitten Koma decides to make a stop motion film. She begins to write the storyboards, make the stuffed toys, and draw the background art. Before long, Koma starts making her film — shooting frame by frame with her cute 8mm camera, and carefully checking each frame. But her shooting is interrupted by an obnoxious fly, resulting in an unexpected accident. Will she be able to complete her project? (Source: YouTube)

tags.name: Stop Motion
tags.description: Animation style characterized by physical objects being moved incrementally between frames to create the illusion of movement.

title: Zdravstvuite!
titleNative: ズドラーストヴィチェ！
synopsis: On a summer day an strange man who teaches Russian at the beach took me to a town. The familiar town looked totally fresh from a different point of view. The man should be there at the beach tomorrow. Graduate Work 2015 by Yoko Yuki, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. Prizes: - ASK? FILM FESTIVAL 2015 11th ANNIVERSARY, ASK? award - Image forum Festival 2015, audience award - Inter Collage Animation Festival 2015, audience award - MPTE AWARDS 2015, Aoi thubasa award (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Houkago Pilot
synopsis: A bizarre depiction of after-school activities in a typical Japanese high school by Kei Okayama. Meant as a pilot episode. The audience is shown several scenes from different kinds of clubs and activities such as Basketball, Baseball, self-studying, etc... As well as general moments of fun between the students at this school.

title: Paper Rabbit Rope x AU Collaboration

title: Yotsuya Iroha
synopsis: The Yotsuya Alphabet tells the story of a girl caught in a surreal world through the use of Japanese characters. Graduate Work 2010, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Genshin Impact: The Lights of Lantern Rite
titleEnglish: Genshin Impact: The Lights of Lantern Rite
synonyms: 원신 저 멀리 어둠 속의 등불
synopsis: On this annual festival, people return from far and wide to gather in blissful reunion. They share stories of past joys and sorrows, and wish for all the best in the year to come. Though fireworks may fade, laughter leaves behind a lingering warmth, one that nestles deep and sweet within the heart. (Source: YouTube description)

title: Odoriko Clinoppe
synopsis: The surreal, comical television anime follow the daily life of Clinoppe and an office lady named Onei-san. (Source: Anime News Network) Based on GREE's Odoriko Clinoppe Creature-Raising Game.

title: Qiu Niang
synopsis: The unknown interior designer, Hans Duan (22 years old), was involved in a criminal dispute as he designed the house for one of the members in that group. Unfortunately, he was persecuted as a murderer due to the case and sentenced to death. In the prison, he met a scientist from the government (Code name No.73) who asked him to take part in a human experiment. But the experiment failed and Hans died. His body was buried in a dump in the city. However, the experimental medicine left in his body leads to gene mutation. Hans is revived and changed into a woman. What will happen on him (her)?

tags.name: Gender Bending
